package repository

import (
    "context"

    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type CreateUserSpec struct {
    Name string
}

type UserRecord struct {
    ID   int
    Name string
}

type UserRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *UserRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, input CreateUserSpec) (UserRecord, error) {
    _ = ctx
    _ = input
    return UserRecord{}, nil
}
